india_trends.title: Parliamentary panel to review domestic output of petroleum products on 15 May
india_trends.summary: India’s parliamentary panel will review fuel and fertilizer supplies on 15 May amid disruptions caused by the West Asia war. While petrol and diesel stocks remain stable, LPG shortages persist due to the Strait of Hormuz blockade, prompting booking restrictions and supply monitoring.

india_trends.title: Multibagger small-cap stock to be in focus on Friday after company swings to profit in Q4
india_trends.summary: Indo Thai Securities reported a net profit of ₹26.18 crore for the quarter ending March 2026, recovering from a loss of ₹2.58 crore a year ago. The stock has gained 30% recently and offers a dividend of ₹0.10 per share.

india_trends.title: Zerodha’s Rs 7,400 crore MTF book highlights retail shift from cash trading to leveraged bets: Nithin Kamath
india_trends.summary: India's retail trading has shifted towards leveraged products like Margin Trading Facility (MTF) since the pandemic, with cash market activity seeing slower growth. Zerodha's MTF book has surged to nearly Rs 7,400 crore, driven by increased appetite for leveraged positions. Traders are cautioned to

india_trends.title: Bharat Forge Q4 results: Cons PAT falls 17% YoY to Rs 233 crore, revenue up 18%
india_trends.summary: Bharat Forge reported a 17% year-on-year fall in net profit to Rs 233 crore for the March-ended quarter, despite an 18% revenue growth to Rs 4,528 crore. The company recommended a final dividend of Rs 6.50 per equity share. Despite demand challenges, Bharat Forge secured significant new orders, part

india_trends.title: Gold, silver rates today: Gold climbs $76/oz, silver jumps $5/oz on softer dollar and easing geopolitical fears
india_trends.summary: On 7 May, gold and silver continued their upward trend due to improved US-Iran relations. Gold rose $76, and silver gained $5. Crude oil prices declined, raising expectations for potential rate cuts as the market awaits the upcoming US employment report.
